subparts.text: Define international marketing and explain its importance
What is the EPRG framework? Explain with a brief example.
What is meant by market screening in the context of international marketing?
Define licensing and joint ventures as market entry strategies.
What is the International Product Life Cycle ? Give one example.
Explain the concept of product standardization vs. adaptation.
What is the role of overseas agents in international distribution?

questions.question_text: Define international marketing. Discuss its nature and importance in the current global environment. Also, explain the various orientations under the EPRG framework.
Describe the components of the international marketing environment. How do macro and micro factors influence international marketing decisions? CO Mapping
What is market segmentation in international marketing? Discuss the process of screening and selection of international markets.
Explain any five international market entry strategies with relevant examples. Compare them in terms of control, risk, and investment. CO Mapping
Discuss product planning and new product development strategies for international markets. Also, explain how the product life cycle plays a role in international marketing.
What are the key pricing strategies for international markets? Explain the factors influencing international pricing decisions. CO Mapping
Define international distribution channels. Discuss the selection and management of overseas agents and distributors.
What are the various strategies used in international promotion? Discuss the challenges and considerations involved in designing global promotional strategies.
